The person in the blue apron completes trimming the yellow muffin top on the cone. They hold the cone upright in their right hand to show the leveled surface. The silver knife is held in the left hand, lowered away from the cone. White bowls and blue utensils remain on the table.
Scene continues without notable changes.

The view shifts to reveal finished dessert cones on a pink surface. An orange cone and the pink cone sit in the foreground, while yellow and another orange cone stand in the background with blue straws. Cones topped with white frosting and colorful sprinkles appear in the immediate foreground, completing the colorful display.

The camera holds steady on the finished dessert display on a pink cloth. Orange and pink cones in striped wrappers sit centrally, flanked by foreground cones with white frosting and sprinkles. Background cups hold yellow and orange treats with blue straws. A hand hovers near the top left straw.

Colorful dessert cones sit arranged on a pink cloth. Foreground cones display white and brown frosting with sprinkles, while central cones hold orange and pink mounds in striped wrappers. A hand interacts with a blue straw in a background yellow cone, slightly adjusting its position within the static display.

The camera cuts to a person wearing a blue apron with red text over an orange shirt. They hold a pink dessert cone in their left hand while gesturing with their raised right hand. A dark wooden cabinet and green curtains are visible in the background behind the person.

The person in the blue apron and orange shirt turns to face the camera directly, raising their right hand to wave. They continue holding the pink dessert cone in a striped wrapper in their left hand. A window with jars on the sill and green curtains are visible in the background.

compressed_segments.text: [2-8] A bare arm from a striped garment hovers near blue straws in rear cups with yellow and orange mounds, then moves an open palm over a left orange mound in a striped cup. A second hand reaches for a green plate of pastries near a stationary ice cream tub. Three foreground cones with sprinkles and a pink tablecloth remain still. [8-12] The palm lifts and retreats upper-left as the second hand withdraws. Three cones and four colorful cups (orange, pink, yellow) remain stationary on the pink cloth while the arm exits. [12-14] The camera pans rapidly right, blurring the scene to reveal white bowls with yellow and pink mixtures and small yellow cups, obscuring the initial dessert display. [0-2] A table draped in pink fabric displays three ice cream cones with toppings and four cups containing bright orange, pink, and yellow mounds. A person's arm reaches from the upper right to touch and adjust the yellow mound situated in the back row. [14-24] The camera reveals a red box labeled "Joy Sugar Cones" and a stack of packages topped with a pink and white striped party hat. [298-302] A person places a pink-frosted cupcake into a pink and white striped paper cone, guiding it down with one hand while holding the cone upright with the other. They secure the cupcake inside, wrapping the paper snugly around the yellow cake base. Both hands hold the assembled treat upright above the dark table surface, where a tub of white frosting, loose blue straws, and a white bowl are visible nearby. [302-306] The person holds the cone steady with their right hand while their left hand points at a separate empty striped cone standing on the table. Finally, the left hand grasps a blue plastic straw from the table and positions it near the upper rim of the cone, hovering just above the pink frosting.

[306-314] A person holds a pink-frosted cupcake inside a striped paper cone with their right hand over a dark wooden table. Their left hand positions a blue plastic straw against the side of the cone near the top rim and inserts it into the dessert assembly. As the left hand pushes the straw into the cupcake, the right hand stabilizes the cone, leaving the straw protruding from the side. The person then grips the protruding straw near the pink frosting with their left hand, adjusting its position slightly while stabilizing the assembly near bowls of ingredients. The hands continue to hold the straw inserted in the side of the dessert as the sequence ends.

[128-130] Using a red spatula in their left hand, the person scoops chocolate ice cream from a small bowl on the table. Their right hand holds a sugar cone topped with a yellow muffin. Containers of white frosting and pink dip remain on the wooden surface near blue utensils and a striped party hat. [314-320] A person holds a pink-frosted cupcake secured inside a striped paper cone. A blue plastic straw protrudes from the side near the top, gripped by the left hand while the right hand supports the cone base. White bowls containing yellow and white substances sit on the dark table surface nearby as the dessert assembly is held steady.

[322-326] The camera focuses on a dessert display arranged on a pink cloth. Central orange and pink mounds sit in red-and-white striped paper cones, while foreground cones feature white and brown frosting topped with colorful sprinkles. In the background, cups hold yellow and orange treats with blue straws, where a hand briefly adjusts a straw. [326-330] The scene cuts to a woman wearing an orange shirt and a blue apron with red text. Holding a pink dessert cone in her left hand, she initially gestures before turning to face the camera directly and waving her right hand. Green curtains and a window with jars on the sill are visible behind her.
